content.en:
Of course.

The Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance came to the Lone Star Nation Alliance, the road was too far, and the process was very dangerous, plus the ordinary Eternal Dao Realm would not know about the Lone Star Realm Alliance, otherwise they would definitely find a way to come.

But he didn't have enough strength to force it over, and the end result was that he fell halfway.

Ye Tian went to the Eternal Fire Sea this time, naturally wanting to get more resources.

After all, the Eternal Fire Sea also has the resources to improve the Eternal Dao Seed, and it is said that in the depths of the Eternal Fire Sea, there are treasures that strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed.

So, he came here to try.

Anyway, his replica body stays on the side of the Lone Star Realm Alliance, so he has to find something to do.

......

Eternal fire.

Ye Tian came here, this place is not far from the Lone Star Realm Alliance, and the closest eternal realm to here is the Lone Star Realm, and the Lone Star Realm is also the most powerful Eternal Realm here, and it has never entered the realm of the Realm God Realm.

And the closest to the Eternal Fire Sea also causes the Lone Star Realm to be very powerful.

Moreover, the Lone Star Realm does not allow other Eternal Dao Realms to open up Eternal Realms nearby, and there was once an Eternal Realm that was opened up nearby, which was closer than the Lone Star Realm.

As a result, after some time, the lord of the kingdom fell.

So since then, there have been no 100 He Eternal Dao realms in this vicinity to open up the Eternal Realm.

The Eternal Sea of Fire looks like a sea of fire, with high temperatures and flames affecting many planes.

Ye Tian touched the Eternal Fire Sea with his hand, and immediately felt the terrifying power of the flames.

Of course, this flame power was not dangerous to him, but it was dangerous for the ordinary Eternal Dao Realm.

"If you haven't cultivated the Eternal Dao Seed, you can't enter the Eternal Fire Sea at all!"

Ye Tian judged.

Of course.

Some Eternal Dao Realms that have not cultivated to the Eternal Dao Species, if they cultivate to reach the peak of the Eternal Dao Realm, and then prepare some Eternal Primordial Treasures that can save their lives, they will be able to survive in the outermost area of the Eternal Fire Sea for a while, but they will not stay long.

However, this is meaningless and dangerous, and it is likely to fall into the eternal fire.

After all, the flames in the sea of eternal fire are not actually considered real threats, the real threats are something else.

"Let's go in first!"

Ye Tian entered the Eternal Fire Sea, and the scorching Eternal Fire Sea flames could not threaten him.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to go deeper into the Eternal Fire Sea. (cfeh)

According to his information, the Eternal Fire Sea is divided into the outer layer, the inner layer, and the core layer, and the outer layer is not threatening, and the Eternal Dao Realm that has cultivated the Eternal Dao Seed can easily survive in the outer layer.

And the inner layer is dangerous, if the Eternal Dao Body is not fully completed, there will be danger in the inner layer of the Eternal Fire Sea.

And if you want to enter the core layer, you must at least be a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, or even a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, and if you enter the core layer, there is a possibility of falling.

And it was the core layer of the Eternal Fire Sea that threatened the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm, where even the Eternal Realm God Realm did not dare to step into it easily.

Ye Tian has no interest in the Eternal Fire Outer Layer, there are not many resources here, and the grade is also low, looking for resources here is undoubtedly a waste of time.

Therefore, it is better for him to go to the inner layer and the core layer to find resources.

Wow!!!!!

Ye Tian shuttled quickly, and soon shuttled through the outer layer and entered the inner layer of the Eternal Fire Sea.

As soon as you enter the inner layer, the power of the flames here is terrifying, and the Eternal Dao Body can't bear it even if you enter here.

And not long after entering the inner layer of the Eternal Fire, a pair of crimson eyes appeared in the void, staring at him.

"Eternal Fire Spirit!"

This is a special spirit born from the Eternal Fire Sea, just like the Eternal Yin Spirit in the Eternal Yin Wind Belt.

There are a lot of such eternal fire spirits, and they can't be killed.

The Lone Star Realm had also prevented a large number of Eternal Dao Realms from besieging and killing this group of Eternal Fire Spirits, but after killing them, they were bred again, so they didn't care about it.

The strength of this Eternal Fire Spirit staring at Ye Tian is not weak, it is about comparable to a powerhouse in the Eternal Dao Body Xiaocheng Realm.

This kind of eternal fire spirit will hardly go to the outer layer, because the flame power of the inner layer is more suitable for its growth, and it will naturally not go to the energy-poor outer layer.

Of course.

If you're unlucky, it's not impossible.

Rumble!!!!!

This Eternal Fire Spirit slashed towards Ye Tian, and Ye Tian shook it in the void with one hand.

"Dao Seed Secret Technique - Grip of the Sun!"

In an instant, this Eternal Fire Spirit was held by a terrifying force, and it was instantly crushed to pieces.

After killing this Eternal Fire Spirit, Ye Tian continued to move forward.

In a few moments, he found a grain of eternal fire.

"Good stuff indeed!"

Ye Tian collected this grain of eternal fire sand.

Although this thing is useless to him, it is useful to the human race, if you don't see it, it's just that, but after seeing it, you naturally have to put it away, you can't waste it!

After that, Ye Tian continued to look for resource treasures in the inner layer, and after looking for treasures in the inner layer for a while, he went to the core layer to find treasures.

But.

There are quite a few Eternal Dao realms that come here to find resources, so it is not easy to obtain resources.

Time passed, and a relatively long time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian sensed that the energy of the Eternal Fire Sea was flowing in one place.

"In this case, it may be the eternal flame!"

Ye Tian shuttled over.

And just as he was passing, it happened that another Eternal Dao Realm had also passed.

Both sides arrived here almost at the same time.

"Sure enough, it's the Eternal Flame!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

This Eternal Flame is actually a special flame, but it is not the same as the flame of the Eternal Fire, and it is easy to identify.

And the Eternal Flame is absorbing the energy of the Eternal Fire Sea and is slowly growing.

Next to the Eternal Flame, there are also three Eternal Fire Spirits, who are absorbing energy with the help of the Eternal Flame to strengthen their bodies.

The Eternal Dao Realm who arrived at the same time as Ye Tian was an Eternal Dao Realm of the Eternal Dao Body Perfection Realm, and after he saw Ye Tian, he sensed the breath on Ye Tian's body and immediately ran away.

Obviously, he didn't dare to compete with Ye Tian for this eternal fire.

Ye Tian saw the Eternal Flame for the first time, and he was a little interested in the Eternal Flame.

Immediately, he used the Sun's Grip to instantly kill the three Eternal Fire Spirits, and then grabbed the Eternal Flame in one hand.

"What a wonderful eternal fire, bring it back to the human race, if there is a problem with the human race's eternal path in the future, you can use the eternal fire to suppress the problem of the eternal path!" Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he put away the eternal flame and continued to explore the inner layer of the eternal fire.
